rationale: The cited paper’s core finding (counterintuitively improved response under certain promotion structures) is conceptually adjacent to the citing paper’s claim that tempting alternatives can increase donations, so it could be a theoretical/background precedent rather than a purely incidental citation. However, the evidence here is only a single DOI-level match (ref index 25) with no local citation context or quoted reference text showing substantive use. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop but also not clearly a strong keep.
